message:
🐛 Fix OAuth status check timing and Setup Instructions for dev mode (#1613)

- Check OAuth status when dropdown opens (not just dev panel toggle),
  fixing false "OAuth not configured" on first render
- Setup Instructions now opens Developer Setup dialog when running in
  dev mode (installMethod === 'dev'), showing source/OAuth instructions
  instead of nightly/stable build instructions

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
